# dex_retargeting (vendored)

This is a vendored copy of [dex_retargeting](https://github.com/dexsuite/dex-retargeting)
with additional RealHand robot entries and configs required for
the RealHand L6 / L20 dexterous hands. It is intended to be installed from
this directory instead of the PyPI version.

Installed automatically by `setup.sh` / `setup_conda.sh` in the parent project.
